# Playlists.Views.PlaylistsMoreByCuratorView

**Object**

Additional content by the same curator for this playlist.

## Declaration

```swift
object Playlists.Views.PlaylistsMoreByCuratorView
```

## Related Objects

- **Playlists.Views.PlaylistsMoreByCuratorView.Attributes**: Attribute metadata for the view containing additional content by the same curator for this playlist.

## Related Objects
